extra.message: User input from the 'name' parameter is concatenated directly into a string which is then rendered as a Jinja2 template. This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI), leading to Remote Code Execution.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

extra.message: A synchronous 'requests.get' call without a timeout is made inside an 'async def' endpoint. This blocks the asynchronous event loop and can lead to a Denial of Service (DoS) for all concurrent requests.
A hardcoded secret token 'SUPER_SECRET_TOKEN' was found in the configuration. Hardcoded credentials can easily be extracted and lead to unauthorized access.
